title: Graded mesh B-spline collocation method for boundary value problems
author: Andisso, Duressa

steps.title: Convergence analysis
steps.instruction: In this section error bound for cubic B-spline collocation method is found. Let the mesh intervals be denoted by Ii=[xi−1,xi],i=1,2,⋯,N. For p,m∈N,m<p, let:spm(ΩN)={s∈cm[0,1]:s|Ii∈Πp,fori=1,2,⋯,N}.andsp,0m(ΩN)={s∈spm(ΩN):s(0)=s(1)=0,},where Πp is the space of polynomials of degree less than or equal to p.
